name: Lorenzo Bianchi Chignoli
bio:
I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at Universitat Pompeu Fabra and Barcelona School of Economics, and a Research Intern at the Bank of Italy (Monetary Policy Strategy, Economic Outlook and Monetary Policy Directorate). I work on Macroeconomics, in particular New Keynesian theory, macrofinance, and monetary policy transmission, and I often solve my models with deep nerual networks. 

I earned my degree in Economics at the University of Pavia as a Ghislieri College Fellow and IUSS Scholar. Outside of academia, I run, hike, and prove that you don't need to be good at guitar or chess to enjoy them.

contact.address: C. Ramon Trias Fargas, 25-27 | 08005 Barcelona, Spain
